Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Heatshiver Leather Hood Evasion: 290 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Variant: Pre 3.0.0 Variant: Pre 3.19.0 Variant: Pre 3.23.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 4 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 20 Implicits: 0 {variant:1}+1 to Level of Socketed Fire Gems {variant:1}+1 to Level of Socketed Cold Gems {range:0.5}(80-100)% increased Evasion Rating 60% increased Mana Regeneration Rate {variant:1}{range:0.5}-(20-10)% to Fire Resistance {variant:2,3,4}{range:0.5}+(20-30)% to Fire Resistance {variant:1}{range:0.5}-(20-10)% to Cold Resistance {variant:2,3,4}{range:0.5}+(20-30)% to Cold Resistance {variant:2}{range:0.5}(20-30)% increased Cold Damage if you have used a Fire Skill Recently {variant:2}{range:0.5}(20-30)% increased Fire Damage if you have used a Cold Skill Recently {variant:3,4}Gain 1% of Cold Damage as Extra Fire Damage per 1% Chill Effect on Enemy {variant:3}Gain 100% of Cold Damage as Extra Fire Damage against Frozen Enemies {variant:4}Gain 30% of Cold Damage as Extra Fire Damage against Frozen Enemies Corrupted
